+ back to AI Banner Creator Workflow
AI Banner Creator Workflow

Step 02 — Input Collection

The GPT asks for the product inputs it needs: a PDP link (or product name + category if no link), review screenshots or raw review text (top negatives are useful), and any internal brand or BM notes. Partial inputs are fine — the GPT will proceed and make explicit assumptions where data is missing. Answer “Yes” to move to the next step when you’ve shared what you have.

← Previous step Next step →
